programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: Yus, a mild-mannered doormat, vents his rage by tossing killer litteruntil one reckless throw involving a durian leaves Nina injured, prompting the ALD gang to launch a manhunt.

programme.title: Fire Country S1
programme.desc: A former inmate firefighter harboring a grudge against Sharon returns to carry out his revenge.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent Series 18
programme.desc: Britain's Got Talent 2025, the 18th series, will feature Ant and Dec returning as hosts and Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon, and Bruno Tonioli as judges. The series will include a variety of acts vying for the chance to perform at the Royal Variety Performance and win a 250,000 prize.

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral S7
programme.desc: From whirling tornadoes to torrential rains, to harrowing hurricanes, Weather Gone Viral gives viewers unprecedented access to some of the most insane meteorological moments from around the world. Featuring videos of the most extreme and destructive weather conditions, firsthand accounts, and professional meteorologists sharing tales from the front lines, viewers get to experience the fury of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Long Weekends
programme.desc: Join us in our 2nd part of travelling on a limited budget in Hong Kong! With 411 left for Day 3 to 5, will Georgina be able to make the best of her remaining budget and explore more spots? Let's find out!

programme.title: Lion Mums S4
programme.desc: Durrani gets frustrated when she is met with resistance from Min Yi who doesn't want to get involved in her Green Leaf project. Chae Lian tries to inject some romance back into her marriage. Grace has mixed feelings about getting too close to Sandra. Meanwhile, Nabilah's past experience comes back to haunt her when she encounters a new teacher.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: Slugterra S3
programme.desc: Slugterra is an epic sci-fi comedy adventure set deep underground, where the ammo's alive and only the quick survive! In this luminous, high-tech, underground world every cavern holds a new adventure, new battle and weird little slugs to be discovered!

programme.title: Ollie And Friends 5
programme.desc: The gang and the aliens visit the zoo to paint the elephants, but in the aliens' mischief, they lose their triangular box in a zoo enclosure. The gang is having a sleepover when the Triangle Man accidentally causes the power to go out. The gang goes looking for other sources of light and stumbles upon their new friends: fireflies.

programme.title: Sesame Street S55

programme.title: Go Jetters: Sr2
programme.desc: The series has lots more of the comedy, teamwork, great gadgets (including a brand new vehicle), awesome sights and funky facts about amazing landmarks that young viewers and their parents have come to love. Travelling the world with their teacher, mentor and friend Ubercorn, a disco-grooving unicorn, the Go Jetters are fixing the mishaps caused by the mischievous meddlings of Grandmaster Glitch in new locations including Central Park in New York, Machu Picchu, China, Japan, Mali, and Petra.

programme.title: Lil Wild S3

programme.title: Lil Wild S3
programme.desc: Bao and Floogie are rescued thanks to Suzie's quick wit and her animal friends. Meanwhile, after being abandoned by Wobi, Rara looks for a way home, or rather, a way out!

programme.title: Lupin's Tales S1
programme.desc: Lupin dreams of being like the storybook heroes he admires, and goes from one tale to the next to live out their adventures. But the impetuous wolf-cub is far from perfect, and it's not easy getting to that "happy ending"! Luckily, he can count on the Narrator's help to learn from his mistakes.

programme.desc: In order to learn and master Terastallization, Liko, Roy, and Dot have joined the Naranja Academy's "Tera Training"! They meet Clavell, the school's director, and Geeta, the chairwoman of Paldea's Pokmon League as well as the Elite Four of Paldea: Rika, Poppy, Larry , and Hassel. And so begins their adventure in Paldea Region, setting their sights on their Terastallization debut!

programme.title: Busy Bodies
programme.desc: Evie learns that she is short-sighted! But she refuses to admit it! It's up to Med and Aidan to persuade her to fix her myopic problem with glasses. However, the Busy Bodies must first explore how the eye works, and why things look fuzzy to us. Is seeing believing? They take a field trip to learn how our eyes can play tricks on us!

Guided by Yuan Bao, Nenek, Diya, and Reindeer, she learns the true meaning of courage, family, light, and love. Inspired by the unity and passion around her, she discovers her wish to become a shooting star that shines for a brighter, multicultural Singapore.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Caught On Camera
programme.desc: A funny and frightening rollercoaster journey investigating our planet's most extreme weather as told and filmed by ordinary people caught in the eye of the storm'. We follow the incredible human stories of the families caught up in snowstorms, avalanches, floods, landslides, terrifying wildfires and too close for comfort lightning strikes. The film uses jaw dropping, often never-before-seen footage, captured on cameras and phones.

programme.title: Legion
programme.desc: When a group of strangers at a dusty roadside diner come under attack by demonic forces, their only chance for survival lies with an archangel named Michael, who informs a pregnant waitress that her unborn child is humanity's last hope.

programme.title: Incredible Tales S8
programme.desc: In the age of digital technology and other scientific wonders, many in the Philippines still believe in witchcraft. To them, stories about hexes aren't merely tall tales but narratives of caution. Hexes are tools of retribution, vengeance and justice.

programme.title: The Ark S1
programme.desc: Follows the remaining crew of a spacecraft known as Ark One, who must become the best versions of themselves to stay on course and survive after experiencing a catastrophic event that caused massive destruction and loss of life.

programme.title: Animal Impossible
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: 饭罪现场

programme.title: 众神之地
programme.desc: 象群有十几头大象首领苏托多傣语完美之象当地人也叫它武则天老大阿提基多傣语国王除此之外还有老二老三老四等等其中老大老二老三三头成年公象是同一辈分新出生的小象都是老大的后代2007年这群大象从西双版纳国家级自然保护区管护局勐养子保护区出走渡过澜沧江辗转迁徙新的水电大坝和高速公路切断了回家的路它们和其他家族彻底失去了联系被困多年无法见到别的象群即将成年的公象无法找到配偶如何繁衍成了它们最大的问题当发情期到来决斗一触即发刚刚成年的老四向前来挑衅的老二发起挑战可惜它还是太过于年轻没有足够的力量战胜前辈老四不断后退发出叫声向自己的父亲也是象群现在的老大求救谁也没想到老大看着这一幕转身离开了这几乎是一个违背动物世界规则的决定.

But Nizam was tricked by his sister Nana to take a loan on her behalf and he is forced to sell his current apartment to pay for the loan.

As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

Rashid tried to improve his relationship with his father. How can the Salahudin family learn from their mistakes? Perhaps this holy month of Ramadan can unite them? Watch Tetamu Ramadan a family drama filled with secrets.

programme.title: Jom Berbuka

programme.title: Air Tangan
programme.desc: Join young influencer Fikah Zainal as she gets her hands dirty in the kitchen for a cooking lesson with her beloved grandmother, Madam Norah, on a traditional family recipe, fried beef lungs with potato and glass noodles. programme.title: Kyrgyzstan
programme.desc: Kyrgyzstan is a country that resembles a hidden paradise and is seldom explored. This Central Asian nation is home to 1,001 extraordinary treasures that remain untouched by modernity. With its snowy mountains, sea-blue lakes, rows of white yurts, and hundreds of tame horses, Kyrgyzstan offers a unique experience for travellers.

programme.title: Indonesia Authentic Places

From defining beaches to magical mountains and wild forests, be prepared to be amazed by authentic Indonesia.
